{{Infobox group
| name = Empire (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Empire (The Elder Empire: Sea) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Aurelian Empire]] is a vast civilization currently facing significant instability and the threat of fragmentation into separate kingdoms. For much of its history, it has been unified under the rule of an immortal Emperor who maintains order by utilizing the power of the [[Elders]] to stand above humanity. This ruler traditionally serves as a negotiator with these powerful entities and uses specialized technology, such as a throne designed to amplify [[Reading]], to interact with them. However, following the death of the previous Emperor—who was unable to resist the awakening of the [[Dead Mother]]—the Empire has been managed by four [[Regents]]. This period of regency has seen rising political tension, the emergence of social cracks, and a resurgence of ancient traditions among groups like the [[Izyrians]]. [[The Empire]]'s survival is constantly challenged by the [[Elders]], god-like beings who control fundamental aspects of existence such as time, space, [[life]], and death. These entities often seek the downfall of human civilization. To defend against them, the Empire relies on various specialized groups and guilds, including the [[Blackwatch]], which studies [[Elder]] biology, the [[Navigators]], who traverse the dangerous [[Aion Sea]] using [[Elderspawn]] guides, and the [[Champions]]. [[The Empire]]'s stability is closely tied to its ability to contain [[Elder]] activity and prevent the total collapse of society into disunity.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|For five years, the Empire has been maintained by a group of four [[Regents]]. During this time, the government officially registered every [[Soulbound]] located on the continent and conducted extensive travel throughout its territories. While the Empire is currently led by a ruler of Elderspawned descent, it maintains a profound hatred for the [[Elders]]. To defend against threats, the [[Blackwatch]] is tasked with studying these [[Elders]]. Ultimately, the Empire faces the existential risk of its civilization disappearing if it lacks proper direction.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Empire]] has been held together for five years by four [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Empire]] officially registered all [[Soulbound]] on the continent.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The characters have traveled throughout the Empire.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] studies [[Elders]] to defend the Empire.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Empire]] holds a deep hatred for the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Empire]] is ruled by an Elderspawned ruler.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c15">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Empire]] is at risk of civilization disappearing if no one directs it.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Empire]] functions as a governing body, though certain villages feel excluded from its reach. Internal instability threatens the state as a lack of cooperation between various [[Guilds]] puts the entire structure at risk of collapse. While [[Calder]]'s crew shows a willingness to defy this political entity, the Empire's loyal [[Guilds]] remain committed to protecting the people. Ultimately, [[Calder]] intends to steer the direction of the Empire's politics.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Empire]] is at risk of falling apart due to a lack of cooperation between [[Guilds]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Empire]] is a governing body that some villages feel they are not truly part of.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]]'s crew was willing to defy the Empire.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The loyal [[Guilds]] of the Empire will protect the people.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Empire]] is a political entity that [[Calder]] intends to steer.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Identified by the moon-in-sun emblem, the Empire is a political entity referenced during [[Cheska]]'s accounts. The stability of the realm would be enhanced by the return of the crown, and it is suggested that being ruled by a leader with a human lifespan would provide further benefits. Ultimately, the various forces of the Empire appeared to maintain control over their affairs.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Empire]]'s emblem is the moon-in-sun.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Empire]] is a political entity mentioned by [[Cheska]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Empire]] would benefit from the return of the crown.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Being ruled by someone of human lifespan would benefit the Empire.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The forces of the Empire appeared to have things well in hand.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“You two have been all over the Empire, haven’t you?”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
